name: discord-vscode
description: Update your discord status with a rich presence.

scripts.lint: pnpm run build:check && prettier --check . && cross-env TIMING=1 eslint --format=pretty src
scripts.format: pnpm run build:check && prettier --write . && cross-env TIMING=1 eslint --fix --format=pretty src

commands.title: Enable Discord Presence in the current workspace
Disable Discord Presence in the current workspace

discord.enabled.description: Controls if the Discord Presence should show across all workspaces

discord.detailsIdling.description:
Custom string for the details section of the rich presence when idling
	- '{empty}' will be replaced with an empty space.

discord.detailsEditing.description:
Custom string for the details section of the rich presence
	- '{empty}' will be replaced with an empty space.
	- '{file_name}' will be replaced with the current file name.
	- '{file_extension}' will be replaced with the current file extension.
	- '{dir_name}' will get replaced with the folder name that has the current file.
	- '{full_dir_name}' will get replaced with the full directory name without the current file name.
	- '{workspace}' will be replaced with the current workspace name, if any.
	- '{workspace_folder}' will be replaced with the currently accessed workspace folder, if any.
	- '{workspace_and_folder} will be replaced with the currently accessed workspace and workspace folder like this: 'Workspace - WorkspaceFolder'
	- '{current_column}' will get replaced with the current column of the current line.
	- '{current_line}' will get replaced with the current line number.
	- '{current_errors}' will get replaced with the current file's error count.
	- '{current_warnings}' will get replaced with the current file's warning count.
	- '{current_problems}' will get replaced with the current file's problem count.
	- '{total_lines}' will get replaced with the total line number.
	- '{file_size}' will get replaced with the current file's size.
	- '{git_repo_name}' will be replaced with the active Git repository name (from the git URL)
	- '{git_branch}' will be replaced with the current active branch name.

Custom string for the details section of the rich presence when debugging
	- '{empty}' will be replaced with an empty space.
	- '{file_name}' will be replaced with the current file name.

	- '{current_column}' will get replaced with the current column of the current line.

	- '{current_errors}' will get replaced with the current file's error count.

	- '{git_branch}' will be replaced with the current active branch name.

Custom string for the state section of the rich presence when idling
	- '{empty}' will be replaced with an empty space.

discord.lowerDetailsNoWorkspaceFound.description:
Custom string for the state section of the rich presence when no workspace is found.
If set to '{empty}', this will be an empty space.
	- '{current_line}' will get replaced with the current line number.
	- '{current_errors}' will get replaced with the current file's error count.
	- '{current_warnings}' will get replaced with the current file's warning count.
	- '{current_problems}' will get replaced with the current file's problem count.
	- '{total_lines}' will get replaced with the total line number.
	- '{file_extension}' will be replaced with the current file extension.
	- '{file_size}' will get replaced with the current file's size.

discord.largeImageIdling.description: Custom string for the largeImageText section of the rich presence when idling

discord.largeImage.description:
Custom string for the largeImageText section of the rich presence.
	- '{lang}' will be replaced with the lowercased language ID
	- '{LANG}' will be replaced with the uppercased language ID

discord.smallImage.description:
Custom string for the smallImageText section of the rich presence
	- '{app_name}' will get replaced with the current Visual Studio Code version.

discord.suppressNotifications.description: Decides if error messages are shown to the user

discord.fileExcludePatterns.description: Regular expression patterns of files to hide from Discord Presence. Matching files are shown as private files.

discord.privacyMode.description: Hides file names, folder names, workspace names, Git repository names, and remote repository buttons from Discord Presence.

discord.privacyDetails.description: Text shown in the details section when privacy mode is enabled.

discord.privacyLargeImageKey.description: Discord Rich Presence asset key used as the large image when privacy mode is enabled.

discord.repositoryButtonLabel.description: Label for the remote repository button.

discord.showIdleImage.description: Shows a sleep/idle image instead of the default idle keyboard image when there is no active file.

discord.swapBigAndSmallImage.description: Swaps the big and small image on the rich presence

discord.idleTimeout.description: Time (in seconds) to clear the presence when idling. 0 (the default) means no clearing

discord.button1Label.description: Label for custom button 1 on Discord Rich Presence

discord.button1Url.description: URL for custom button 1 on Discord Rich Presence

discord.button2Label.description: Label for custom button 2 on Discord Rich Presence

discord.button2Url.description: URL for custom button 2 on Discord Rich Presence
